text: Thank you for calling Hardin Sloan Injury Law. I'm their AI receptionist. How may I help you? Hi, I was recently in a car accident, so I need an attorney. Thank you for sharing that. Can you tell me a little more about the situation? Yeah, I was rear-ended at a red light. It was the other driver's fault. I'm sorry to hear about your accident, but I'm glad you're reaching out for help. Let's gather some details to assist you further. Can I start by getting your full name? Ashley Johnson? Thank you, Ashley. What's the best phone number to reach you at? It's 404-555-0199. Could you also provide your email address? It's Ashley underscore J15 at gmail.com. Could you tell me the county where the incident occurred? Yeah, it was in Gwinnett County. Was a police report filed for the incident? Yes. Were you the one driving at the time of the accident? Yes, I was. Have you received any medical treatment for your injuries? Yes. The next step is scheduling a brief call with our intake specialist to gather more details from you, and then we can determine whether we will accept your case. Do you have any questions before we proceed with scheduling? Yeah, does that cost anything? No, the initial consultation with our intake specialist doesn't cost anything. We work on a contingency fee basis, which means you don't pay any fees unless we win your case. Is there anything else you'd like to know before we schedule your call? How soon can I get scheduled? I don't have that answer, but let me transfer you to our scheduling team and they will assist you in setting up the earliest available time. One moment, please. Hi, this is Matthew with Heart and Sloan Injury Law. I'll be helping you schedule your consultation to confirm, am I speaking with Ashley Johnson? Yes. Perfect. Let me take a look at our calendar. We have openings tomorrow between 1 p.m. and 4 p.m. or Friday between 10 a.m. and 12 p.m., which works best for you. Friday at 10 o'clock is good for me. Great. Let me get you down for that. Just a moment. All right, you're confirmed for this Friday at 10 a.m. with the intake specialist. You'll get a confirmation email and our intake specialist will call you at the time of your appointment. Thank you. Thanks for calling and have a great day. You too. Bye-bye.
